properties.SQL Statement:
INSERT INTO DIM_ORDER (
  ORDER_ID,
  PURCHASE_DATE_KEY,
  APPROVED_DATE_KEY,
  CARRIER_DATE_KEY,
  DELIVERED_DATE_KEY,
  ESTIMATED_DATE_KEY,
  ORDER_STATUS
)
VALUES (
  '${ORDER_ID}',
  TO_NUMBER(NULLIF('${PURCHASE_DATE_KEY}', '')),
  TO_NUMBER(NULLIF('${APPROVED_DATE_KEY}', '')),
  TO_NUMBER(NULLIF('${CARRIER_DATE_KEY}', '')),
  TO_NUMBER(NULLIF('${DELIVERED_DATE_KEY}', '')),
  TO_NUMBER(NULLIF('${ESTIMATED_DATE_KEY}', '')),
  '${ORDER_STATUS}'
)

properties.SQL Query:
SELECT ORDER_SK, ORDER_ID AS ORDER_ID_R
FROM DIM_ORDER
WHERE ORDER_ID = '${ORDER_ID}'

SELECT
  (SELECT DATE_SK FROM DIM_DATE
    WHERE FULL_DATE = TO_DATE(SUBSTR('${PURCHASE_DATE}', 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  ) AS PURCHASE_DATE_KEY,

  (SELECT DATE_SK FROM DIM_DATE
    WHERE FULL_DATE = TO_DATE(SUBSTR('${APPROVED_DATE}', 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  ) AS APPROVED_DATE_KEY,

  (SELECT DATE_SK FROM DIM_DATE
    WHERE FULL_DATE = TO_DATE(SUBSTR('${CARRIER_DATE}', 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  ) AS CARRIER_DATE_KEY,

  (SELECT DATE_SK FROM DIM_DATE
    WHERE FULL_DATE = TO_DATE(SUBSTR('${DELIVERED_DATE}', 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  ) AS DELIVERED_DATE_KEY,

  (SELECT DATE_SK FROM DIM_DATE
    WHERE FULL_DATE = TO_DATE(SUBSTR('${ESTIMATED_DATE}', 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  ) AS ESTIMATED_DATE_KEY
FROM DUAL
